name: aggregator produces identical output across consecutive runs (determinism)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out1.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out2.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const a=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("out1.json","utf8"));const b=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("out2.json","utf8"));delete a.aggregated_at;delete b.aggregated_at;if(JSON.stringify(a)===JSON.stringify(b)){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: outputs differ\n");process.exit(1)}'
setup:
cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/owasp/o.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: OWASP
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/o
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:o
rules:
  - id: o-rule
    name: o
    description: o rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/o.sh
recommended_set: [o-rule]
all_set: [o-rule]
EOF
